title: Formal Diplomatic Register
description: Language of treaties, official statements, and careful public communication.
summary_pt_br: Linguagem diplomática: 'We take note', 'We remain concerned', 'We call upon', 'We reaffirm'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Language of treaties, official statements, and careful public communication.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Linguagem diplomática: 'We take note', 'We remain concerned', 'We call upon', 'We reaffirm'.

scenes.text_en: Language of treaties, official statements, and careful public communication. Focus: formal diplomatic register. We take note of the recent developments in the region.
scenes.text_pt: Linguagem diplomática: 'We take note', 'We remain concerned', 'We call upon', 'We reaffirm'. Foco: formal diplomatic register. Tomamos nota dos desenvolvimentos recentes.

scenes.title: Formal Diplomatic Register
scenes.body_en: Diplomatic phrases: 'We take note of...', 'We remain concerned about...', 'We call upon...', 'We reaffirm our commitment to...'. Passive voice and nominalization dominate.
scenes.body_pt: Linguagem diplomática: 'We take note', 'We remain concerned', 'We call upon', 'We reaffirm'.

examples.en: We take note of the recent developments in the region.
We call upon all parties to return to dialogue.
examples.pt: Conclamamos as partes a voltarem ao diálogo.

examples.en: We reaffirm our commitment to shared security.
examples.pt: Reafirmamos nosso compromisso com a segurança comum.

exercise.question: Complete: "We take note of the recent ___ in the region."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "We take note of the recent developments in the region."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
We call upon all parties to return to dialogue.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "We call upon all parties to return to dialogue."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Conclamamos as partes a voltarem ao diálogo.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Formal Diplomatic Register — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre formal diplomatic register. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We take note of recent developments abroad.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We remain deeply concerned about the situation.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Call for action without being confrontational.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We call upon all parties to return to dialogue.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We reaffirm our commitment to peace and rule of law.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We stand ready to support constructive outcomes.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Diplomatic register: everything important, nothing combustible.

scenes.title: The official statement
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the statement's four moves. Use at least three diplomatic phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the embassy's morning briefing, the cultural attaché shared the text of a carefully balanced statement.

paragraphs.speaker: Attaché
paragraphs.en: We take note of recent developments and remain deeply concerned about the humanitarian implications involved.

paragraphs.speaker: Attaché
paragraphs.en: We call upon all parties to return to dialogue without preconditions and in good faith.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Every verb here is softened by two layers of formality — measured, but never indifferent.

paragraphs.speaker: Attaché
paragraphs.en: We reaffirm our commitment to multilateral cooperation and the principles enshrined in international law.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Diplomatic English, Zara noted, carries every sharp truth in a velvet envelope — never blunt, never silent.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Formal Diplomatic Register". Language of treaties, official statements, and careful public communication. We take note of the recent developments in the region. We call upon all parties to return to dialogue. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Formal Diplomatic Register". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Formal Diplomatic Register".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Formal Diplomatic Register".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.

sources.label: The Economist · Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Jornalismo econômico e político sofisticado — nível C1+.

sources.pt_hint: Ensaios literários e jornalísticos — prosa rica.
